$comment: DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE.  It is generated automatically from typescript interfaces in the project.  To update, run `deno task schema` (with optional `--watch`).  In VSCode, this is run automatically for you on folder open.

language.description: Language code for the quote data, e.g., "en-US"

typeDisp.description: Display name for the quote type, e.g., "Equity" (not always present)

quoteSourceName.description: Source of the quote data, e.g., "Delayed Quote", "Nasdaq Real Time Price"

triggerable.description: Whether price alerts can be triggered for this symbol

customPriceAlertConfidence.description: Price alert confidence level (appears/disappears based on network load)

marketState.description: Current market state for this symbol

tradeable.description: Whether the symbol is currently tradeable

cryptoTradeable.description: Whether cryptocurrency trading is available for this symbol

exchange.description: Exchange code where the symbol is traded, e.g., "NMS"

shortName.description: Short name/ticker display name, e.g., "NVIDIA Corporation"

esgPopulated.description: Whether ESG (Environmental, Social, Governance) data is available

fiftyTwoWeekRange.description: 52-week trading range with low and high values

earningsTimestamp.description: Earnings announcement timestamp (may be inaccurate ±2 days)

earningsTimestampStart.description: Earnings period start timestamp (may be inaccurate ±2 days)

earningsTimestampEnd.description: Earnings period end timestamp (may be inaccurate ±2 days)

epsTrailingTwelveMonths.description: Earnings per share over trailing 12 months

epsCurrentYear.description: Current year earnings per share estimate

priceEpsCurrentYear.description: Price to current year EPS ratio

sourceInterval.description: Data source update interval in minutes

firstTradeDateMilliseconds.description: First trade date in milliseconds since epoch (converted to Date)

priceHint.description: Price precision hint for display purposes

hasPrePostMarketData.description: Whether pre/post market data is available

regularMarketChangePercent.description: Regular market session price change percentage

regularMarketDayRange.description: Regular market session day range with low and high

displayName.description: Display name for the symbol, e.g., "NVIDIA"

ipoExpectedDate.description: Expected IPO date for upcoming listings

QuoteBase.description:
Base interface for all quote data containing common fields across all asset types.

This interface includes essential information that appears for all financial instruments, including stocks, ETFs, options, cryptocurrencies, etc.

Quote.description:
Union type for all possible quote data structures.

The actual interface returned depends on the `quoteType` field:
- `"EQUITY"` → QuoteEquity
- `"ETF"` → QuoteEtf
- `"CRYPTOCURRENCY"` → QuoteCryptoCurrency
- `"OPTION"` → QuoteOption
- `"MUTUALFUND"` → QuoteMutualfund
- `"CURRENCY"` → QuoteCurrency
- `"FUTURE"` → QuoteFuture
- `"INDEX"` → QuoteIndex
- `"MONEYMARKET"` → QuoteMoneyMarket

QuoteField.description: All possible field names available in quote data

ResultType.description: Return format options for quote results

QuoteResponseArray.description: Quote result as an array (default return type)

QuoteResponseMap.description: Quote result as a Map with symbol as key

QuoteResponseObject.description: Quote result as an object with symbol as property name

fields.description: Specific fields to return. If not specified, all available fields are returned. Some essential fields like `language`, `quoteType`, `symbol` are always included.

return.description:
Format for the returned data:
- `"array"` (default): Returns array of quotes in same order as input symbols
- `"object"`: Returns object with symbol names as keys
- `"map"`: Returns Map with symbol names as keys

fields.description: Specific fields to return. If not specified, all available fields are returned. Some essential fields like `language`, `quoteType`, `symbol` are always included.

return.description:
Format for the returned data:
- `"array"` (default): Returns array of quotes in same order as input symbols
- `"object"`: Returns object with symbol names as keys
- `"map"`: Returns Map with symbol names as keys

QuoteOptionsWithReturnArray.description: Quote options with array return type (default)

fields.description: Specific fields to return. If not specified, all available fields are returned. Some essential fields like `language`, `quoteType`, `symbol` are always included.

return.description:
Format for the returned data:
- `"array"` (default): Returns array of quotes in same order as input symbols
- `"object"`: Returns object with symbol names as keys
- `"map"`: Returns Map with symbol names as keys

QuoteOptionsWithReturnMap.description: Quote options with Map return type

fields.description: Specific fields to return. If not specified, all available fields are returned. Some essential fields like `language`, `quoteType`, `symbol` are always included.

return.description:
Format for the returned data:
- `"array"` (default): Returns array of quotes in same order as input symbols
- `"object"`: Returns object with symbol names as keys
- `"map"`: Returns Map with symbol names as keys

QuoteOptionsWithReturnObject.description: Quote options with object return type

query.description: - Symbol or array of symbols to get quotes for.   Use search() to find symbols if needed.

queryOptionsOverrides.description: - Optional configuration:   - `fields`: Only return specific fields   - `return`: Format as "array", "object", or "map"

validateOptions.description: If false, lib won't validate and will leave that to Yahoo

validateResult.description: If false, will pass back unvalidated / untyped result from Yahoo

devel.description: Filename to use for cached result

fetch.description: An alternative fetch function to use just for this call
